title: Leadership Visibility
description: Provide leadership with the visibility they need to make strategic decisions and remove bottlenecks

sections.title: Executive Visibility & Control
sections.subtitle: Empower leadership with actionable data and insights

sections.content: Leadership needs clear visibility into pipeline health, deal progress, and organizational performance. This section covers how to structure reporting, metrics, and reviews that give executives the insights they need without creating administrative overhead.

stages.label: 1. Daily Pulse Metrics
stages.description: Track key indicators: pipeline value, velocity, deal counts by stage

stages.label: 2. Weekly Pipeline Review
stages.description: Assess movement, identify risks, and reallocate resources

stages.label: 3. Monthly Business Review
stages.description: Comprehensive analysis of trends, performance vs plan, and strategic adjustments

stages.label: 4. Quarterly Planning
stages.description: Adjust strategy, set targets, and plan resource allocation

mistakes.whyHarmful: Inflates pipeline and masks real sales capacity
Misses early warning signs and loses opportunities for coaching

mistakes.text: No clear hand-off from sales to implementation
mistakes.whyHarmful: Drives customer dissatisfaction and poor contract execution

keyTakeaways: Clean pipeline data is the foundation of visibility
Establish regular review cadences at daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly levels
Use metrics to drive coaching and development, not just performance reviews
Visibility enables faster decision-making and resource allocation
